violations.description: Icon buttons (➕, 📥, 🔄) have no aria-label. Emoji icons are not reliably announced by screen readers. The tooltip text is only visible on hover and not programmatically associated.
Tooltip text is only visible on CSS :hover. It is not accessible via keyboard focus and not linked to the button with aria-describedby.
violations.reference_fix: Add User

page_description: An admin panel with a sidebar navigation, icon buttons with hover-only tooltips, and a user management table. Icon buttons lack accessible names and tooltips are not keyboard-accessible.
